DoorType.LockedMessage: ^tI need to secure Wolf's End first.=^tOnce the goblins and undead are under control...=^tI'll be able to head inland to the rest of Ellyria.
^tI should go back to town=^tI should talk to the villagers in the town
^tThat path leads to the river=^tWith goblin tracks in and out=^tThe villagers might know more about this
^tA dank tomb=^tWith goblin tracks in and out=^tThe villagers to the west might know more about this
^tIt's closed and locked=^tNo one has been here in a long, long time.=^tMaybe someone in Wolf's End knows more about it.
^tDark and impassable=^tAre those spider webs?=^tIck=^tNo one's going to Felbridge that way yet.
^tSomeone has fortified this tower.=^tI should check in with the soldiers from Wolf's End.=^tThey've had time to scout the area.
^tA tower of a happier time=^tThose villagers can help me plan my plundering
^tA Tuatara fort.=^tI should see if my allies know more about it.=^tSo I know what I'm getting into.
^tLots of big animal tracks around here.=^tI should see if the scouts know more about what's inside.
^tThe Citadel of Wissen.=^tI need to check with the scouts and see if they know more about who's inside.
^tThis granary used to feed thousands.=^tSome of the soldiers from Wolf's End will know more about it.
^tThis old citadel is stranger than the others.=^tI wonder what the scouts have learned about it.
^tThere is a huge graveyard behind this gate.=^tThe Felbridge folk might know more about this.
^tA powerful magic barrier blocks the way.=^tThis bridge leads to the Castle Hocke=^tI need to figure out how to get in there.=^tAnd how to be ready for what's inside.
^tThe gate seems to be locked=^tMaybe the other entrance is open
^tThis road leads into the Stormshard Mountains.=^tIt is little used except by monsters now.=^tI may find need to go there.=^tBut first let's get Felbridge sorted.
^tA powerful magic seals this entrance.=^tI still need to learn more about the Sleeping Lands.
^tMaybe I should head to town to find out more.
^tDeep woods.=^tThere are bandit tracks all over this forest.=^tMany tracks go east from here.
^tA dark cavern.=^tNowhere I want to go right now.
^tThe Steward's house.=^tIt looks neat and clean inside.
^tA closed mausoleum.=^tIt looks like someone lives here.=^tI'll check with my friend from Wolf's End andfind the outpost to the west and ask them.
^tAnother dusty mausoleum.=^tI wonder if they know more at the outpost.
^tAnother grim tomb.=^tIt says 'Here lies Lord Crovnag.'=^tI wonder who that was.=^tThe witch Yagarah might know.
^tA grim, dark tomb.=^tI wonder if they know more at the outpost.
^tYet another dark dungeon door.=^tLike so many on this hill.=^tThe witch Yagarah could tell me more.
^tIt's closed and locked.=^tAnd grim and dark.=^tThe witch Yagarah can help me figure out which mausoleums Nephit might be in.
^tIt's closed and locked=^tI wonder if that witch can help me learn more about this place.
^tNice waterfall.
^tThe path is crumbled and impassable.=^tIt heads around the mountainside.
^tA dark cavern.=^tGoblin tracks lead in.=^tThe villagers might be able to tell me more.=^tBetter find out what I'm getting into...=^tBefore I tear these goblins up.
^tA crevice in the mountainside.=^tProbably certain death in there.=^tTheexpeditin from Felbridge might know this mountain better.
^tAnother tunnel into the mountain.=^tLike many.=^tI should check with the expedition from Felbridge.
^tA mysterious doorway.=^tI wonder why that statue is here.=^tThe Felbridge folk could tell me more.
^tThe river leads up into the rocks.=^tThe Moai could tell me where in these mountains Meylour's followers are.
^tIt's locked.=^tThe expedition from Felbridge might be able to tell more more.
^tA tunnel.=^tThe expedition member may know more.
^tAbandoned mineshaft.=^tProbably nothing in there.=^tThe expedition might know more.
^tI'm going to clear these caves before I leave.
^tAbandoned mineshaft.=^tProbably nothing in there.=^tThe expedition might know more.
^tI'm going to clear this cave before I leave.
^tDeep abandoned mineshaft.=^tProbably nothing in there.=^tThe expedition might know more.
^tI'm going to clear this cave before I leave.
^tDeeper abandoned mineshaft.=^tProbably nothing in there.=^tThe expedition might know more.
^tI'm going to clear this cave before I leave.
^tMysterious cavern=^tHalf collapsed=^tDo I see glowing rock?=^tI hope I never have need to go in there

^tAnother Dreadfold Portal. Like the one in Felbridge, but closed.=^tA shortcut to the Dread doppelganger of these Glades?=^tTo open this gate, I must cross into the Dreadfold by the Felbridge Portal.=^tAnd find this portal's twin in Dread Emerald Glades.
^tA strange side path.=^tMaybe that dryad back west can tell me more.
^tA hole in the trunk.=^tThose dryads might be able to tell me more.
^tA hole in the roots.=^tThese dryads might know where it leads.
^tA strange temple.=^tThe dryads might tell a bit more about what I'm getting into here.
^tA strange ruin=^tThe dryads might tell a bit more about what I'm getting into here
^tA dark sidedoor.=^tI should ask the survivors where it leads.
^tA side path to the other side of the battlefield.=^tThe survivors in the courtyard might know more.
^tThe door to this ancient tower is barred.=^tI need the password.
^tA dark passage.=^tMaybe the wizard Titus will know more.
^tA dungeon entrance.=^tMaybe Titus can tell me where it leads.
^tWhoa, hot magic.=^tI should ask Titus about this.
^tI'm not ready yet.=^tI should take care of things here first.

^tAnother Dreadfold Portal. Like the one in Felbridge, but closed=^tA shortcut to Dread Shazari, no doubt=^tTo open this gate, I can cross into the Dreadfold by the Felbridge Portal=^tThen make my way to this portal's twin in Dread Shazari=^tDo I dare?
^tTitus should be able to tell me about this strange door.=^tI saw him back west.
^tA strange passage down.=^tI hear strange chittering.=^tI can ask those desert folk what's inside.
^tI hear the clash of arms below.=^tI bet the desert townsfolk can tell me more.
^tA strange gate.=^tGzarek and his nomads might know where it leads.
^tA mysterious burial ground.=^tI'll ask the guy with the dog head what he knows.=^tNaturally.
^tThat is one colossal pyramid.=^tPerhaps Titus can tell me the lore of this place.=^tI will ask him what he can tell me.

^tAnother Dreadfold Portal. Like the one in Felbridge, but closed=^tA shortcut to Dread Valhaven, no doubt=^tTo open this gate, I can cross into the Dreadfold by the Felbridge Portal=^tThen make my way to this portal's twin in Dread Valhaven=^tDo I dare?
^tThis is one shady alley.=^tI shouldn't be here.
^tLooks like he went this way.=^tBetter take care of this mess first.
^tI wonder why this tea shop is locked.=^tMaybe someone in town knows.
^tThe sewer opening is cold and dark.=^tI hear eerie voices echo from within.
^tI have strayed to far from town.=^tI should head back.
^tThese doors must enclose great secrets.=^tSomeone has to know how to get in.
^tThis palace is impressive and uninviting.=^tI better go before the guards comes.
^tThis must be the city barracks.=^tThe imperial army is huge.
^tThe door creaks and cracks from age.=^tThis door seems out of place.
^tLooks like an ancient vault.=^tBetter turn back before I get lost.
^tWord on the street is some pretty bad people roam these parts.=^tI should go search for more information.
^tLooks like one of the emperor's guard towers.=^tThey sure do keep a tight watch.
^tLooks like one of the emperor's guard towers.=^tThere is so much security here.
^tThis seems better fortified than before=^tMaybe the villagers know more about this
^tThat path leads to the river=^tWith goblin tracks in and out=^tThe villagers might know more about this
^tA dank tomb=^tWith goblin tracks in and out=^tThe villagers to the west might know more about this
^tIt's closed and locked=^tI think I can see evil seeping out=^tMaybe these villagers know whether it holds plunder=^t..Or certain death
^tSomeone has fortified this tower.=^tI should check in with the soldiers from Wolf's End.=^tThey've had time to scout the area.
^tA tower of a happier time=^tThose villagers can help me plan my plundering
^tA Tuatara fort.=^tI should see if my allies know more about it.=^tSo I know what I'm getting into.
^tLots of big animal tracks around here.=^tI should see if the scouts know more about what's inside.
^tThe Citadel of Wissen.=^tI need to check with the scouts and see if they know more about who's inside.
^tThis granary used to feed thousands.=^tSome of the soldiers from Wolf's End will know more about it.
^tThis old citadel is stranger than the others.=^tI wonder what the scouts have learned about it.
^tDark and impassable=^tAre those spider webs?=^tIck=^tNo one's going to Felbridge that way.
^tThere is too much evil behind this gate.=^tThe Felbridge folk might know more about this.
^tThe way is blocked by powerful magic.=^tThis bridge leads to Castle Hocke.=^tI need to figure out how to get in there.=^tAnd how to be ready for what's inside.
^tThe gate seems to be locked.=^tMaybe the other entrance is open.
^This road leads into the Stormshard Mountains=^tIt is little used except by monsters now=^tI may find need to go there=^tBut first let's get Felbridge sorted
^tMaybe I should head to town to find out more.
^tDeep woods.=^tThere are bandit tracks all over this forest.=^tMany tracks go east from here.
^tA dark cavern.=^tNowhere I want to go right now.
^tThe Steward's house.=^tIt looks neat and clean inside.
^tA closed mausoleum.=^tIt looks like someone lives here.=^tI'll check with my friend from Wolf's End andfind the outpost to the west and ask them.
^tAnother dusty mausoleum.=^tI wonder if they know more at the outpost.
^tAnother grim tomb.=^tIt says 'Here lies Lord Crovnag.'=^tI wonder who that was.=^tThe witch Yagarah might know.
^tA grim, dark tomb.=^tI wonder if they know more at the outpost.
^tYet another dark dungeon door.=^tLike so many on this hill.=^tThe witch Yagarah could tell me more.
^tIt's closed and locked.=^tAnd grim and dark.=^tThe witch Yagarah can help me figure out which mausoleums Nephit might be in.
^tIt's closed and locked=^tI wonder if that witch can help me learn more about this place.
^tNice waterfall.
^tThe path is crumbled and impassable.=^tIt heads around the mountainside.
^tA dark cavern.=^tGoblin tracks lead in.=^tThe villagers might be able to tell me more.=^tBetter find out what I'm getting into...=^tBefore I tear these goblins up.
^tA crevice in the mountainside.=^tProbably certain death in there.=^tTheexpeditin from Felbridge might know this mountain better.
^tAnother tunnel into the mountain.=^tLike many.=^tI should check with the expedition from Felbridge.
^tA mysterious doorway.=^tI wonder why that statue is here.=^tThe Felbridge folk could tell me more.
^tThe river leads up into the rocks.=^tThe Moai could tell me where in these mountains Meylour's followers are.
^tIt's locked.=^tThe expedition from Felbridge might be able to tell more more.
^tA tunnel.=^tThe expedition member may know more.
^tAbandoned mineshaft.=^tProbably nothing in there.=^tThe expedition might know more.
^tI'm going to clear these caves before I leave.
^tAbandoned mineshaft.=^tProbably nothing in there.=^tThe expedition might know more.
^tI'm going to clear this cave before I leave.
^tDeep abandoned mineshaft.=^tProbably nothing in there.=^tThe expedition might know more.
^tI'm going to clear this cave before I leave.
^tDeeper abandoned mineshaft.=^tProbably nothing in there.=^tThe expedition might know more.
^tI'm going to clear this dungeon before I leave.
^tMysterious cavern=^tHalf collapsed=^tDo I see glowing rock?=^tI hope I never have need to go in there

^tAnother Dreadfold Portal. Like the one in Felbridge, but closed=^tA shortcut to the Dread doppelganger of these Glades?=^tTo open this gate, I must cross into the Dreadfold by the Felbridge Portal=^tAnd find this portal's twin in Dread Emerald Glades
^tA strange side path=^tMaybe that dryad back west can tell me more
^tA hole in the trunk=^tThose dryads might be able to tell me more
^tA hole in the roots=^tThese dryads might know where it leads

^tA strange temple=^tThe dryads might tell a bit more about what I'm getting into here=^tMany ruined temples have more death than treasure=^tA little preparation goes a long way=^tMy grandpappy used to say

^tA strange ruin=^tThe dryads might tell a bit more about what I'm getting into here=^tMany ruined temples have more death than treasure=^tA little preparation goes a long way=^tMy grandpappy used to say
^tA dark sidedoor.=^tI should ask the survivors where it leads.
^tA side path to the other side of the battlefield.=^tThe survivors in the courtyard might know more.
^tThe door to this ancient tower is barred.=^tI need the password.
^tA dark passage.=^tMaybe the wizard Titus will know more.
^tA dungeon entrance.=^tMaybe Titus can tell me where it leads.
^tWhoa, hot magic.=^tI should ask Titus about this.
^tI'm not ready yet.=^tI should take care of things here first.
^tTitus should be able to tell me about this strange door.=^tI saw him back west.
^tA strange passage down.=^tI hear strange chittering.=^tI can ask those desert folk what's inside.
^tI hear the clash of arms below.=^tI bet the desert townsfolk can tell me more.
^tA strange gate.=^tGzarek and his nomads might know where it leads.
^tA mysterious burial ground.=^tI'll ask the guy with the dog head what he knows.=^tNaturally.
^tThat is one colossal pyramid.=^tPerhaps Titus can tell me the lore of this place.=^tI will ask him what he can tell me.
^tThat is one colossal pyramid=^tPerhaps Titus can tell me the lore of this place=^tI will ask him what he can tell me

^tAnother Dreadfold Portal. Like the one in Felbridge, but closed=^tA shortcut to Dread Valhaven, no doubt=^tTo open this gate, I can cross into the Dreadfold by the Felbridge Portal=^tThen make my way to this portal's twin in Dread Valhaven=^tDo I dare?
^tThis is one shady alley.=^tI shouldn't be here.
^tLooks like he went this way.=^tBetter take care of this mess first.
^tI wonder why this tea shop is locked.=^tMaybe someone in town knows.
^tThe sewer opening is cold and dark.=^tI hear eerie voices echo from within.
^tI have strayed to far from town.=^tI should head back.
^tThese doors must enclose great secrets.=^tSomeone has to know how to get in.
^tThis palace is impressive and uninviting.=^tI better go before the guards comes.
^tThis must be the city barracks.=^tThe imperial army is huge.
^tThe door creaks and cracks from age.=^tThis door seems out of place.
^tLooks like an ancient vault.=^tBetter turn back before I get lost.
^tWord on the street is some pretty bad people roam these parts.=^tI should go search for more information.
^tLooks like one of the emperor's guard towers.=^tThey sure do keep a tight watch.
^tLooks like one of the emperor's guard towers.=^tThere is so much security here.
